summary: The documentation build failed because `transformers/modeling_utils.py` contains an unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) at line 1974. When the doc-builder tries to import the transformers package to generate API docs for `llama.md`, Python raises a `SyntaxError` on the conflict marker, aborting the build.
root_cause: An unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) was left in `transformers/modeling_utils.py` at line 1974. Python cannot parse this file, raising `SyntaxError: invalid syntax`, which causes the documentation build to fail when processing `docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md`.

evidence.quote:

    <<<<<<< sonic-moe

evidence.reason: A git merge conflict marker `<<<<<<< sonic-moe` was left in modeling_utils.py at line 1974, causing Python to raise a SyntaxError when the file is imported.

evidence.quote:
SyntaxError: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
invalid syntax
evidence.reason: The doc-builder surfaces the SyntaxError as a failure to convert llama.md, confirming the build was aborted due to the unresolvable import.
The process exited with a non-zero code, confirming the CI job failed.

suggested_fix: Resolve the git merge conflict in `transformers/modeling_utils.py` around line 1974 by removing the conflict markers (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`, `=======`, `>>>>>>>`) and keeping the correct code, then commit the resolved file.
